description_long: This is an old, open book resting on a flat white platform, with visible signs of age such as yellowed, slightly curled pages and worn edges. The book is opened to reveal handwritten text in dark ink, with the script appearing neat and consistent across both visible pages. The pages are thin and slightly translucent, with some areas showing minor stains and discoloration, suggesting significant use or age. The binding is visible along the spine, which appears to be fragile and possibly cloth-bound, with no visible cover illustration or decorative elements. The book's overall appearance is utilitarian and historical, lacking any modern embellishments or glossy finishes. The object exudes a sense of antiquity and scholarly value, likely used for reference or archival purposes.
description: An old, open book with yellowed, handwritten pages and a worn, fragile spine, resting on a white platform. The book shows signs of age and use, with no visible cover illustration or decorative elements.
description_view_0: The book is seen from a low angle, highlighting the thickness of the pages and the curvature of the open spine, with handwritten text clearly visible on both pages.
description_view_1: Viewed from the top edge, the book's open pages are fully visible, showing the neat handwriting and the even spread of the book, with the spine mostly hidden.
description_view_2: This view shows the book from the opposite side of view 0, emphasizing the right page and the slightly uneven, aged edges of the paper.
description_view_3: From this angle, the book's left edge and the layered, slightly curled pages are prominent, with the text still visible but less central.
